title: leontodon oxylepis var. oxylepis
intro: Leontodon oxylepis var. oxylepis, also known as Autumn Hawkbit, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, due to its bitter compounds and essential oils. Autumn Hawkbit can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health purposes.
